title: Zebulon-B frigate
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{StarshipClass |image= |name=Zebulon-B frigate |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]''[[Hard Merchandise]]'' |line= |model= |type=[[Frigate/Legends|Frigate]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role= |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|How many did we get out?''"
''"Four of the ''Lancer''-class frigates, sir. Those were our top priority. The rest we extracted were Zebulon-B frigates.|[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Gennad Rozhdenst]] and [[Ott Klemp]] of Scavenger Squadron|}} The '''Zebulon-B frigate''' was a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] in production by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] that was designed for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|navy]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Scavenger Squadron]] hijacked multiple Zebulon-B frigates from the KDY [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] during an [[Bombing of the Kuat shipyards (4 ABY)|attempt]] by KDY's leader, [[Kuat (person)|Kuat of Kuat]] [[Gender/Legends|himself]], to scuttle the docks. ==History== [[File:KDY.svg|thumb|left|250px|The frigates were manufacuted by Kuat Drive Yards.]] The Zebulon-B [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] was produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], a major [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturer, in the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. It was in production by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' states that the events of ''[[The Bounty Hunter Wars]]'' trilogy, including ''[[Hard Merchandise]]'', take place between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The series establishes that the [[Bombing of the Kuat shipyards (4 ABY)|bombing of the Kuat shipyards]], during which the Zebulon-B [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]] are mentioned, takes place following the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]], which ''The Essential Reader's Companion'' establishes takes place in 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]. As such, the bombing and mention of Zebulon-Bs must therefore also take place in 4 ABY. take place at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], some Zebulon-B frigates were being built at the KDY shipyards in preparation for when they would boost the ranks of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] after the result of a forthcoming battle near the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]], a major confrontation between the two sides that KDY was anticipating. However, as the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] was being fought, the [[Kuat (person)|current]] [[Kuat of Kuat/Legends|Kuat of Kuat]] and head of KDY, not wishing to see the shipyards be taken over by the same Empire to which the company sold some of its products, tried to [[Bombing of the Kuat shipyards (4 ABY)|destroy]] the shipyards with explosives. As the yard went up in flames, [[Scavenger Squadron]], an Alliance [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|unit]] keeping an [[Eye/Legends|eye]] on the docks, managed to rescue multiple Zebulon-Bs as well as four [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigates]]. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] also saved most of the shipyards from destruction, foiling Kuat's plan to take down KDY. ==Behind the scenes== The Zebulon-B frigate was first mentioned in ''[[Hard Merchandise]]'', a [[1999]] novel written by [[K. W. Jeter]] as the third volume of ''[[The Bounty Hunter Wars]]'' trilogy. ==Appearances== *''[[Hard Merchandise]]'' {{1stm}} *[[Hard Merchandise (abridged audiobook)|''Hard Merchandise'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Fragata Zebulón-B }} [[Category:Frigate classes]] [[Category:Kuat Drive Yards products]] [[Category:Starship classes of the Galactic Empire]]
